perturbation.original_text: Additional Reporting Person (a): Merck Serono SA Address: Zone Industrielle 1267 Coinsins, Switzerland Additional Reporting Person (b): Merck KGaA Address: Frankfurter Str. 250 64293 Darmstadt, Germany
perturbation.changed_text: Additional Reporting Person (a): Merck Serono SA Address: Zone Industrielle 1267 Coinsins, Switzerland Additional Reporting Person (b): Novartis AG Address: Frankfurter Str. 250 64293 Darmstadt, Germany
perturbation.explanation: The modification creates an in-text contradiction by changing the Additional Reporting Person (b) from Merck KGaA to Novartis AG. This contradicts the later sections of the document that explicitly refer to actions and affiliations of Merck KGaA. This introduces uncertainty about which company's actions are being jointly filed and creates potential legal ambiguities. The document's references to 'MERCK KGAA, DARMSTADT, GERMANY' become contradictory.
perturbation.contradicted_text: MERCK SERONO SA, COINSINS, SWITZERLAND, AN AFFILIATE OF MERCK KGAA, DARMSTADT, GERMANY MERCK SERONO SA, COINSINS, SWITZERLAND, AN AFFILIATE OF MERCK KGAA, DARMSTADT, GERMANY By: /s/ Cédric Hyde By: /s/ Tearaboth Te Name: Cédric Hyde Name: Tearaboth Te Title: CFO Title: Treasury Director
perturbation.justification: The changed text replaces 'Merck KGaA' with 'Novartis AG' as Additional Reporting Person (b). The contradicted text refers to 'MERCK KGAA, DARMSTADT, GERMANY' and an affiliate of Merck KGaA. This creates a direct contradiction because the changed text now indicates that Novartis AG, instead of Merck KGaA, is the entity whose actions are being jointly filed, creating an inconsistency that could lead to confusion and unenforceability regarding which company is bound by the agreement. This aligns with the definition of 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' because it provides conflicting information about the relevant parties and their affiliations.

perturbation.original_text: Designated Filer: Ares Trading SA Issuer and CUSIP: Intrexon Corporation (46122T102) Dated: January 7, 2019
perturbation.changed_text: Designated Filer: Ares Trading SA Issuer and CUSIP: Intrexon Corporation (46122T102) Dated: January 7, 2020
perturbation.explanation: The year of the agreement has been changed from 2019 to 2020, but the document is titled PRECIGEN,INC_01_22_2020 suggesting events surrounding the original filing date in 2019. This in-text contradiction concerning the date of the agreement introduces uncertainty about when the joint filing agreement was actually executed and therefore when it is legally binding.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the date of the agreement from January 7, 2019, to January 7, 2020. The contradicted text, "PRECIGEN,INC_01_22_2020-EX-99.1-JOINT FILING AGREEMENT.txt," suggests the agreement pertains to events surrounding an original filing date in 2019 or at least includes that year. This creates an inconsistency because the agreement's title suggests a 2020 filing date, but the body now claims it was signed in 2020. This falls under the definition of inconsistencies, as different sections of the contract provide conflicting dates, creating an in-text contradiction regarding when the agreement was executed and is legally binding.

perturbation.explanation: The modification changes Cédric Hyde's title from CFO to CEO. However, the signature block and accompanying text do not reflect the structural changes implied by having the CEO sign. This creates ambiguity about the signatory's role and authority, and introduces an internal contradiction about if Cédric Hyde signed as CFO or CEO.
perturbation.contradicted_text: MERCK SERONO SA, COINSINS, SWITZERLAND, AN AFFILIATE OF MERCK KGAA, DARMSTADT, GERMANY MERCK SERONO SA, COINSINS, SWITZERLAND, AN AFFILIATE OF MERCK KGAA, DARMSTADT, GERMANY By: /s/ Cédric Hyde By: /s/ Tearaboth Te Name: Cédric Hyde Name: Tearaboth Te Title: CFO Title: Treasury Director
perturbation.justification: The modification changes Cédric Hyde's title from CFO to CEO. The contradicted text shows Cédric Hyde signing as CFO. This directly contradicts the changed text, leading to uncertainty about whether Cédric Hyde signed as CFO (as indicated in the contradicted text) or as CEO (as indicated in the changed title). The contradiction arises because the signature block does not reflect the change in title, creating ambiguity and inconsistency regarding the signatory's role. This falls under 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' as different sections of the contract provide conflicting information about Cédric Hyde's title and the capacity in which he signed the document.
